event: medication with angiotensin II receptor blockers and calcium channel blockers
oxygen saturation 95% on high flow nasal oxygenation
white blood-cell count 10,720 cells per mm3
lactate dehydrogenase blood level 882 U per liter
chest CT showed multiple bilateral ground-glass opacities with a crazy paving pattern
nasopharyngeal swab real-time reverse-transcriptase PCR performed at the admission was positive for SARS-CoV-2
received a 7-day course of dexamethasone (20 mg)
received 1 infusion of eculizumab (1200 mg) on day 2
broad-spectrum antibiotic regimen was stopped upon negative tracheal aspirate BioFire® FilmArray® pneumonia plus panel on day 4
screening for fungal infections with serum galactomannan index and serum β-D-Glucan was negative
condition worsened with increasing vasopressor and oxygen need
tracheal aspirate showed branching hyphae on direct examination with calcofluor white
culture on Malt Extract Agar and Sabouraud Dextrose Agar with Chloramphenicol media isolated A. fumigatus
specific A. fumigatus quantitative PCR performed on tracheal aspirate was positive
bacterial culture on chocolate and blood agar media remained negative
serum galactomannan index, serum β-D-Glucan and serum qPCR-Af were negative
transthoracic echocardiogram showed hypertrophy and dilation of the right ventricle
D-dimer level increased >20000 ng per milliliter with fibrinogen 3.85 g per liter
patient evolved unfavorably and died of a cardiac arrest suspect of massive pulmonary embolism
autopsy was prohibited due to SARS-CoV-2 infection

antifungal susceptibility testing using EUCAST method and according to EUCAST clinical breakpoints showed the following minimal inhibitory concentrations of posaconazole, itraconazole, voriconazole and isavuconazole
DNA was extracted and cyp51A gene was sequenced as previously described
